mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_daily_bill ( waybill_no, customer_code, customer_name, charge_weight, total_amount, merchant_code, merchant_name, settle_province, charge_date, rebate_amount, customer_fee, import_time ) VALUES
( #{item.waybillNo}, #{item.customerCode}, #{item.customerName}, #{item.chargeWeight}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.merchantCode}, #{item.merchantName}, #{item.settleProvince}, #{item.chargeDate}, #{item.rebateAmount}, #{item.customerFee}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT merchant_code, merchant_name, customer_code, customer_name FROM t_daily_bill WHERE merchant_code IS NOT NULL AND merchant_code != ''
SELECT DISTINCT merchant_code, merchant_name, customer_code, customer_name FROM t_daily_bill WHERE merchant_code IS NOT NULL AND merchant_code != '' AND charge_date = #{date}
